# Flav

> Flav is a free iOS app that turns TikTok, Instagram, and web recipe videos
> into structured, cookable recipes in about 10 seconds. Paste a link; Flav's
> AI extracts ingredients, steps, times, and nutrition into a personal cookbook
> with hands-free Cook Mode, AI meal planning, and grocery lists.

## Key Facts
- Flav is free to download on iOS (https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flav/id6759994122). Android is in development — waitlist at https://flav.app/waitlist.
- The free plan includes 10 AI recipe imports per month, an unlimited cookbook, grocery lists, and hands-free Cook Mode with built-in timers.
- Flav imports recipes from any public TikTok video, Instagram Reel, or recipe webpage in about 10 seconds.
- Food creators monetize through viewer tips, premium locked recipes, and brand partnerships. Verified ($7.99/mo) creators keep 85% of earnings; Pro ($19.99/mo) creators keep 90% — well above the ~50% industry norm. Monetization unlocks at 100 followers. Payouts are monthly (15th of the month, $10 minimum). Subscription fees are not part of the creator revenue pool.
- Flav is built by Tig Tech LLC. Support: https://flav.app/support.

## Pages
- Home: https://flav.app — what Flav does, how import works, FAQ
- For Creators: https://flav.app/creators — monetization and bio-link pages
- Verified & Pro: https://flav.app/verified — creator tiers and payout rates
- Recipe Collections: https://flav.app/recipes — 20 category guides
- Comparisons: https://flav.app/compare/{tasty|allrecipes|yummly|paprika|mealime|nytcooking|sidechef|cookpad|samsung-food|bigoven|epicurious|mob-kitchen}
- Blog: https://flav.app/blog · Advertise: https://flav.app/advertise · Support: https://flav.app/support
